channel.title: general on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in general on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: Excellence
item.description: What exactly means “Center of Excellence”? Whatever we want it to mean. We should be brimming with excellence by nightfall. Centers of excellence create more excellence. Evidence? None.

item.title: How much airlines are making on passengers?
item.description: A curious table from The Economist with information on how much airlines make on passengers. Turns out, not that much:

item.title: Experience
item.description: Is experience exactly the same as pessimism?

item.title: Air quality in Europe
item.description:
Surprisingly, Poland has the worst air quality in Europe. Here is an infographics from the Economist:
See also Air Quality Indexes website.

item.title: Media Ideological Placement
item.description: Interesting information on ideological placement of various news outlets by Washington Post:

item.title: Catch22 of closed-mindedness
item.description: For the Nth time have found myself referring back to an exceptionally vivid infographics on how many Ukrainians have ever been abroad:

item.title: Maidan: 23rd of February
item.description: No links today. The only thoughts are with those on the Maindan who gave their lives to the future of Ukraine.

item.title: Migration in progress ...
item.description: Please note, the blog is being migrated from the old WordPress installation.
